overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy dusk view of Night City's urban core from an elevated transit train. The camera glides past a large circular plaza surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards, with a traffic light passing by in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit view of circular urban plaza

agents.ego_description: traveling on elevated metro track overlooking the city plaza

entered.detail: octagonal structure with red neon trim and multiple levels
large floating advertisement screen displaying cycling content above the plaza
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon accents
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with various lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide elevated view of a futuristic circular plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. Heavy rain falls over the wet asphalt streets where vehicles move below. A large holographic billboard floats above the central structure, displaying advertisements against the darkening dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit track passing traffic control signal

events.description: red traffic light pole enters view from the right foreground
traffic signal illuminates bright red as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing along elevated track, passing close by the traffic signal

notable_agents.action: cars moving through the intersection below the plaza

entered.detail: tall signal post with bright red lights mounted on the right side of the track

segments.scene_description: As the train progresses, a traffic light pole enters from the right foreground, glowing bright red. The camera passes by this signal while maintaining the view of the circular plaza and holographic billboard in the background. Vehicles continue to navigate the wet streets below the elevated track.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown vista after passing traffic signal

events.description: traffic light pole exits frame to the left as camera moves past

agents.ego_description: moving past the traffic signal and continuing along the elevated route

segments.scene_description: The traffic light moves to the left and exits the frame as the camera continues its journey. The view opens up again to show the circular plaza and surrounding neon-lit skyline, with rain continuing to fall over the bustling downtown intersection below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous elevated glide over a rainy urban core that shifts from a wide panoramic view to a framed perspective before opening back up to the city skyline. It begins with a sweeping look at a futuristic circular plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and a floating holographic billboard under a darkening dusk sky. As the camera progresses, a bright red traffic light pole enters from the right foreground, momentarily layering the view of the wet asphalt streets and moving vehicles below. The signal then slides to the left and exits the frame, allowing the scene to expand once more. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal the bustling downtown intersection and the neon-lit skyline as heavy rain continues to fall over the city.
